title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 103.
content:
There was an Old Lady of Prague,
    Whose language was horribly vague;
    When they said, "Are these caps?"
    She answered, "Perhaps!"
    That oracular Lady of Prague.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 103.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
